uses: top-tier caster runewords (Last Wish, Phoenix, Faith, Ice)
demand_drivers: Enigma is the most wanted runeword in the game
consistent demand across all ladder ages
supply_notes: drops from Travincal, Chaos Sanctuary, Worldstone Keep, LK super chests
cube recipe from Cham + Sur is usually uneconomical
limited supply relative to mid runes

common_trade_forms: Jah for Ber + Ist / Ber + Vex (symmetric pair trading)
segment_sensitivity: ladder vs non-ladder: significant price difference
softcore vs hardcore: hardcore usually commands higher price
early ladder vs late ladder: price peaks early, declines over time
known_model_risks: Jah is well-modeled by Ist-paired trades in all segments
volume is high enough for stable VWAP

traderie.notes: Primary source. High volume of Ist-paired trades.

reddit.notes: Use for demand, sentiment, confusion points, source discovery, and item-profile updates.

rmt_sites.notes: External cash-market signal only. Do not present as a recommendation to buy or sell.

research_notes.note: Initial draft profile. Jah is the most stable top-tier rune alongside Ber. Core Enigma demand.

open_questions: Does Jah/Ber ratio change meaningfully across ladder age or within a season?
Should Jah be a secondary numeraire for high-end items?
